setup_task.sh explicitly generates this file as the task starting point by stripping furniture from SweetHome3DExample.sh3d.
verifier.py logic directly checks for placed furniture items, new partition walls, text labels, and dimension lines via export_result.sh parsing.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a procedurally stripped version of a real Sweet Home 3D gallery sample (SweetHome3DExample.sh3d, a residential apartment). The setup script correctly removes all furniture to create the bookstore_starter.sh3d blank shell, retaining the baseline walls, labels, and dimension lines. The export script cleanly calculates the delta of new elements added by the agent. The verifier accurately scores the task out of 100 possible points, strictly enforcing a 70-point passing threshold, verifying all objective metadata claims.
